Reports
Generate system reports
🔽 فیلتر گزارش:
Export Data
Export records to various formats
📊
Export to Excel (.xlsx)
Export all orphan records to a formatted Excel spreadsheet with full details.
📝
Export to Word (.html)
Export all records as a formatted Word-compatible document.
📄
Export to CSV
Export records as comma-separated values for use in any spreadsheet app.
🖨️
Print Report
Print a formatted report of all orphan records directly from your browser.
Backup & Restore
Protect and restore your data
💾 Create Backup
Download a complete backup of all orphan records, users, and system settings as a JSON file. Store this securely.
📂 Restore Backup
Restore the system from a previously created backup file. Warning: This will replace all current data.
📁
Click or drag & drop your backup .json file here
📋 Backup History
No backups recorded yet.
⚠️ ریست سیستم
تمام داده‌های موجود (ایتام، مکاتب، کفیل‌ها، نمرات، فارغان، کتاب‌ها) پاک می‌شوند و سیستم به حالت اولیه برمی‌گردد. این عملیات برگشت‌پذیر نیست.
School Management
Define schools used in orphan records
